title: Rebalanced Piglin Bartering [PurpurPack]
body:
## Rebalances the piglin bartering table
### Items and their chances: - **netherite upgrade smithing template** - 0.8% Chance - **soul speed book (Level 1-3)** - 0.8% Chance - **soul speed iron boots (Level 1-3)** - 1.28% Chance - **potion (Fire Resistance)** - 1.6% Chance - **splash potion (Fire Resistance)** - 1.6% Chance - **iron nugget (9 to 36)** - 1.6% Chance - **quartz (8 to 16)** - 3.2% Chance - **glowstone dust (5 to 12)** - 3.2% Chance - **magma cream (2 to 6)** - 3.2% Chance - **ender pearl (4 to 8)** - 3.2% Chance - **string (8 to 24)** - 3.2% Chance - **fire charge (1 to 5)** - 6.4% Chance - **gravel (8 to 16)** - 6.4% Chance - **leather (4 to 10)** - 6.4% Chance - **nether brick (4 to 16)** - 6.4% Chance - **obsidian** - 6.4% Chance - **crying obsidian (1 to 3)** - 6.4% Chance - **soul sand (4 to 16)** - 6.4% Chance - **netherite hoe (Enchantment: Silk Touch)** - 0.16% Chance - **ancient debris (1 to 2)** - 0.16% Chance - **lodestone (1)** - 0.16% Chance - **nether wart (6 to 10)** - 4.8% Chance - **warped wart block (8 to 10)** - 4.8% Chance - **nether wart block (8 to 10)** - 4.8% Chance - **crimson nylium (3 to 6)** - 4.8% Chance - **warped nylium (3 to 6)** - 4.8% Chance - **shroomlight (6 to 15)** - 4.8% Chance - **crimson stem (8 to 15)** - 4.8% Chance - **warped stem (8 to 15)** - 4.8% Chance - **warped fungus (3 to 5)** - 4.8% Chance - **crimson fungus (3 to 5)** - 4.8% Chance - **saddle (1 to 2)** - 0.8% Chance - **gold block (1 to 2)** - 0.8% Chance - **netherite block (1)** - 0.16% Chance - **gilded blackstone (3 to 18)** - 1.6% Chance - **golden carrot (6 to 20)** - 2.4% Chance - **gunpowder (6 to 14)** - 4.8% Chance - **potato (1)** - 0.16% Chance - **sharpness book** - 0.8% Chance - **fire aspect book** - 0.8% Chance - **looting book** - 0.8% Chance - **piercing crossbow** - 0.8% Chance - **music disc pigstep** - 0.32% Chance
### Installation information when using the mod version: These will act functionally the same as the datapack, but apply to all worlds that are created/enabled with this mod on. If you do not want this to apply to all worlds, use the datapack instead **Forge**:
No dependencies required, just place mod into mods folder **Fabric**:
Requires Fabric API **Quilt**:
Requires Quilted Fabric API ### Purpur Packs Purpur Packs are features that have been suggested to be added to Purpur - or would fit Purpur's theme, but were decided would fit better as a datapack!
These datapacks function the same as a singular configuration setting would in Purpur. They can be added and removed at any time without damaging the server.
These work in vanilla, you do not need to be running Purpur to use these
